{
  "analysis": "The antibody is anti-FLAG M2, targeting the FLAG-tag peptide (DYKDDDDK). Now I have all components identified. I need to get the exact sequences from PDB FASTA for Clover, mCherry, and SNAP-tag. I also need to check the FPbase sequences and handle the 'X' residues in PDB FASTA files (which represent chromophore residues).",
  "plan": "Get the exact FASTA sequences from PDB and FPbase for all proteins. Compare to handle X residues properly.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
import urllib.request
import json

# Get FPbase sequences for Clover and mCherry
url = 'https://www.fpbase.org/api/proteins/?format=json'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60)
data = json.loads(resp.read())

for p in data:
    if p['name'] in ['Clover', 'mCherry']:
        print(f"FPbase {p['name']}:")
        print(f"  seq: {p.get('seq', 'N/A')}")
        print(f"  pdb: {p.get('pdb', [])}")
        for s in p.get('states', []):
            print(f"  state: ex={s.get('ex_max')}, em={s.get('em_max')}")
        print()
EOF
",
      "duration": 60.0
    }
  ]
}
